data.current_summary: Get page rank for one or more domains
data.current_description: Retrieves page rank data for specified domains. Supports up to 100 domains per request.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves page rank data for one or more specified domains. Accepts up to 100 domains per request. Requires API key authentication. Returns an array of domain rank objects containing page rank scores and related metrics for each queried domain. Domains not found or with invalid format are included in the response with appropriate status indicators.
